title: Search trends highlight CNBC coverage of stock futures and global events
description: Recent search interest in CNBC follows reports on stock futures remaining little changed after a losing week on Wall Street, alongside coverage of escalating geopolitical tensions affecting global markets.

sources.title: Stock futures are little changed after Wall Street suffers losing week: Live updates
Dow Jones Futures Loom As U.S.-Iran Attacks Escalate; Google, Tesla, AMD Ahead
World in Brief: Global stocks sink; America and Iran escalate attacks

sections.heading: Stock Market Updates
paragraphs: According to CNBC, stock futures are little changed following a losing week on Wall Street. The outlet provided live updates regarding these market movements.

sections.heading: Geopolitical Tensions and Futures
paragraphs: Investor's Business Daily reported that Dow Jones Futures are in focus as attacks between the U.S. and Iran escalate. The report also mentioned specific companies including Google, Tesla, and AMD in this context.

sections.heading: Global Market Reaction
paragraphs: The Economist noted that global stocks are sinking. This observation was made in a brief that also highlighted the escalation of attacks between America and Iran.

sections.heading: Search Interest
paragraphs: The keyword "CNBC" has a reported search lower bound of 10,000 in the U.S. region. Google Trends data captures interest in search terms over time based on user queries.

faq.q: What did CNBC report regarding stock futures?
faq.a: According to CNBC, stock futures are little changed after Wall Street experienced a losing week.

faq.q: How are global stocks performing according to The Economist?
faq.a: The Economist reported that global stocks are sinking.

faq.q: What geopolitical events are influencing the market according to Investor's Business Daily?
faq.a: Investor's Business Daily noted that U.S.-Iran attacks are escalating, which is influencing the context for Dow Jones Futures.
